title: neurolaena macrophylla
intro: Neurolaena macrophylla, also known as Wild Chamomile or Mexican Chamomile, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and calm the skin. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and promoting better sleep, due to its calming effects. Neurolaena macrophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile option for those seeking natural remedies.
